profile.name: Sarfaraz Ahmad
profile.title: Full Stack Developer
profile.subtitle: & Team Lead
bio: I'm Sarfaraz Ahmad — a Full Stack Developer and Team Lead at Cartzlink, Karachi. Since 2019, I've been architecting and leading enterprise ERP systems powering retail and franchise operations across Pakistan.

My core expertise: PHP (Laravel, Yii, CodeIgniter), deep SQL Server & MySQL optimization, and scalable REST API design. I build systems that grow — multi-branch POS, real-time inventory, automated dispatch, and accounting workflows.
Currently expanding into Flutter mobile development for Android & iOS, and connecting Power BI dashboards to ERP data — turning business operations into real-time, actionable insight.
Beyond code, I mentor developers, establish coding standards, and drive agile workflows that keep teams delivering high-quality software on time and within scope.
profile.quote: Fast learner. Problem solver. Team builder. Delivering high-performance software since day one.

projects.title: Retail POS & ERP
projects.short: End-to-end ERP + POS for fashion and wholesale brands.
projects.desc: Complete end-to-end ERP and POS solution designed for fashion and wholesale brands. Automated the entire business workflow — from sales and inventory to dispatch and accounting — enabling real-time visibility across all branches.

projects.title: Order Booking App
projects.short: Flutter mobile app for field sales teams with real-time sync.
projects.desc: Mobile-first Flutter application built for on-field sales representatives. Enables real-time order placement, live tracking of order status, and seamless backend synchronization — available on both Android and iOS.
features: Offline mode with sync on reconnect
Customer catalog with search and filters

projects.title: Swirl Style Platform
projects.short: Full operational platform for fashion brand launch.
projects.desc: Full operational business platform developed for the launch of Swirl Style, a fashion brand. Integrated inventory management, dispatch automation, and Power BI reporting to ensure smooth day-one operations.

projects.title: Sync Automation Modules
projects.short: Automated modules for order sync and duplicate detection.
projects.desc: Built a suite of automated modules that handle summary generation, order synchronization between systems, and intelligent duplicate record detection. Dramatically reduced manual data entry and improved accuracy across platforms.

projects.title: E-Commerce API Bridge
projects.short: RESTful API linking Shopify & WooCommerce to ERP.
projects.desc: Designed and implemented a robust RESTful API bridge connecting Shopify, WooCommerce, and payment gateways directly to the internal ERP system. Unified multi-channel retail operations and eliminated manual order processing.

projects.title: Jinn Social Platform
projects.short: Community app with posts, media uploads, and engagement.
projects.desc: Developed a full-featured community social platform called Jinn (Our Expression Inspired). Users can create accounts, post content, upload media, like and comment — all powered by a Flutter frontend and a scalable PHP backend.

items.title: Team Leadership
items.desc: 5+ years managing cross-functional dev teams — delivering complex ERP projects on time with agile workflows, coding standards, and best practices.

items.title: ERP Architecture
items.desc: Led development of full ERP modules: Sales, Inventory, Dispatch, Accounts, POS for retail and franchise clients across Pakistan.

items.title: API & Integration
items.desc: Architected RESTful APIs with Shopify, WordPress/WooCommerce, and third-party platforms — automating operations at scale.

items.title: Flutter Mobile Dev
items.desc: Building Flutter Order Booking App for Android & iOS — real-time order placement and backend sync for field sales teams.

items.title: Business Intelligence
items.desc: Integrated Power BI dashboards with ERP for real-time KPI tracking and data-driven decision-making.

items.title: Security & Performance
items.desc: System tuning, RBAC, encryption, PowerShell automation for SQL Server backups — secure, scalable architecture.

achievements.title: Promoted to Team Lead
achievements.desc: Recognized for technical excellence and consistent delivery. Promoted to lead cross-functional teams building enterprise ERP solutions for retail and franchise clients.

achievements.title: Shopify & WooCommerce APIs
achievements.desc: Led seamless API integrations with major e-commerce platforms — reducing manual operations and improving real-time data accuracy across systems.

achievements.title: PowerShell SQL Automation
achievements.desc: Built automated SQL Server backup systems and scheduled tasks using PowerShell — improving database uptime and disaster recovery readiness.

achievements.title: ERP & POS Optimization
achievements.desc: Delivered critical ERP module enhancements and POS optimizations recognized by multiple clients for measurably improving daily business operations.

education.name: Aptech Computer Education
education.desc: Aptech Prime 2.2 Diploma (ADSE) — 3-year professional software engineering & full-stack development program.

education.name: Virtual University
education.desc: Bachelor's in Computer Science — ongoing alongside a full-time professional career in software development.

education.name: Saudagran Foundation
education.desc: Entrepreneurship via @KamyabCareer with Delhi Punjabi Saudagran Foundation (DPSF) — successfully completed.
